title: Smooth platform-wide developer & visitor DX
description:
Unified navigation via beskid-hub, legacy redirects, multi-service hosting model (site, auth, tracker, nexus, pckg), and Coolify guidance so every Beskid web surface feels consistent for contributors and readers.

## Provenance
- **Catalog cutoff:** [`aaddd32`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/aaddd32) → [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4) on **beskid** (2026-05-26 – 2026-05-27)
- **Anchor commit:** [`1e73032`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/1e73032)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Status:** Partial — hub, redirects, and hosting model landed; auth hub and Coolify matrix ongoing
- **Workstreams:** `web-auth-web-common`, `platform-docs-dx`
